title: Beaumaris
content:
Roof Restoration Beaumaris

At Sandhurst Roofing, we’re proud to serve the Beaumaris community with top-quality roof restoration services designed for the coastal environment. Our skilled roofers understand the challenges of salt air, storms, and ageing tiles standard in this area — and we deliver long-lasting results that protect and refresh your home for years to come.

Get a Free Quote!

Why Choose Sandhurst Roofing for Roof Restoration in Beaumaris?

  • Local expertise: We’re a family-owned roofing business with over 30 years’ experience in Melbourne’s bayside and south-eastern suburbs.
  • Complete service: From inspection and cleaning through to re-pointing, sealing, painting and gutter replacement — we handle every step.
  • Quality materials: We use top-grade products (including Colourbond® steel) so your roof restoration is built to last and stand up to Beaumaris coastal weather.
  • Fully licensed & insured: All our roof trades are registered and qualified, giving you peace of mind knowing the job is done professionally.
  • Tailored for Beaumaris homes: We’re familiar with the typical roof styles and challenges in Beaumaris — from coastal salt air exposure to older tile roofs.
Get a Free Quote!

Our Roof Restoration Process

In Beaumaris, restoring your roof effectively demands a tailored sequence. Our typical process includes:

  1. Roof inspection – we assess the condition of tiles, flashings, gutters, downpipes and overall structure.
  2. Cleaning & preparation – removing moss, lichen, old bedding, debris and contaminant build-up.
  3. Repair works – replacing broken tiles, re-bedding ridge caps, re-pointing mortar, and straightening flashings.
  4. Gutter & downpipe check – ensuring proper drainage, replacing old or damaged gutters if needed.
  5. Sealing & painting – applying primer/sealer, then top-coat to protect and refresh the roof’s appearance.
  6. Final inspection & clean-up – a full check for leaks, a full site clean-up, and a final walkthrough with you.

Typical Roof Styles We Restore in Beaumaris

  • Terracotta tile roofs on older beachfront homes
  • Cement-tile roofs requiring re-bedding and re-pointing
  • Flat metal roofs on modern townhouses
  • Colourbond® steel roofs, requiring repainting and refinishing

Benefits of Restoring Rather Than Re-Roofing

  • Cost-effective: Restoration often avoids the higher cost of complete re-roofing.
  • Improved lifespan: A properly restored roof can extend decades of helpful service.
  • Enhanced look: A refreshed roof dramatically boosts curb appeal and home value.
  • Better protection: Updated gutters, proper drainage, and sealed surfaces reduce the risk of leaks, salt damage and deterioration.

What Our Customers Say
